title: SQL: wrong results of shift with type casting
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_shift (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, value BIGINT NOT NULL);
SELECT value << 6 FROM test_shift WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT CAST(value AS SIGNED) << 8 FROM test_shift;
SELECT CAST(NULL AS SIGNED) << 32 FROM test_shift;
key_bug_features: Shift operation with type casting produces incorrect results
